description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular book with a vibrant, illustrated cover featuring two stylized characters in the foreground, set against a colorful, dynamic background. The front cover is dominated by shades of purple, orange, and blue, with the characters rendered in a comic or graphic novel style. The back cover contains a block of text and a barcode, with additional graphic elements and a faint background illustration. The spine is narrow, featuring vertical text, small character portraits, and graphic icons, all set on a dark, gradient background. The book appears to be a paperback, with a glossy finish and visible cover art wrapping around the spine. The overall design suggests a modern, visually engaging publication, likely targeted at a young adult or teen audience.
description: A colorful, illustrated paperback book with two stylized characters on the cover and vibrant, comic-inspired artwork. The spine features vertical text and character icons, and the back has a block of text and a barcode.
description_view_0: The back cover displays a block of text, a barcode, and a faint background illustration with warm and cool tones.
description_view_1: The spine is narrow, with vertical text, small character portraits, and graphic icons on a dark, gradient background.
description_view_2: The front cover features two stylized characters in a dynamic, colorful scene with a comic or graphic novel art style.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine is plain and unadorned, showing only the thickness of the book's pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover illustration depicts two stylized, cartoon-like characters standing side by side, one wearing goggles and an orange jacket, the other in a red coat with glasses. The background is a vibrant, abstract blend of purples, blues, and oranges, giving a sense of action and energy, rendered in a graphic novel or comic book style.
attribute_spine_design: The spine features a dark, gradient background with vertical orange and white text, small character portraits at the top and bottom, and graphic icons in between. The design is bold and visually striking, matching the energetic style of the cover.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, white logo with the word 'CHUAA!' is visible on the lower back cover, featuring a stylized, cartoonish hand and speech bubble.
